# Load data
data <- read.csv('/app/data.csv')
y <- data$y
n <- data$n
N <- length(y)

# Prepare data for Stan
stan_data <- list(N = N, y = y, n = n)

# Set random seed
set.seed(1)

# Run sampling
fit <- sampling(
  object = stan_model(file = '/app/hierarchical_model.stan'),
  data = stan_data,
  chains = 4,
  iter = 100000,
  seed = 1,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95)
)

# Extract posterior samples
posterior <- extract(fit)
alpha_samples <- posterior$alpha
beta_samples <- posterior$beta

# Compute posterior means
alpha_mean <- mean(alpha_samples)
beta_mean <- mean(beta_samples)

# Save results
write(alpha_mean, file = '/app/posterior_alpha_mean.txt')
write(beta_mean, file = '/app/posterior_beta_mean.txt')

# Print summary
print(summary(fit, pars = c('alpha', 'beta')))
EOF
